title: BOE Unveils Doomsday Scenario for Private Markets Stress Test
description: The Bank of England will stress test private markets against a doomsday scenario featuring 7% interest rates, a 35% collapse in UK share prices, a 400 basis-point increase in leveraged loan spreads and a wide range of artificial intelligence disruptions, the central bank announced on Friday.

title: Tashkent turns 120 investor proposals into economic reform roadmap
description: Recommendations submitted by international investors during meetings held alongside the Tashkent International Investment Forum will be incorporated into a government reform roadmap covering banking, energy, artificial intelligence, capital markets and corporate governance.
content:
Uzbekistan plans to prepare a formal roadmap based on 120 recommendations submitted by foreign investors, following discussions held alongside the final day of the Tashkent International Investment Forum.

title: Reliance AGM 2026 Key Highlights: All eyes on Mukesh Ambani as $4 bn Jio IPO, AI plans take centre stage
description: RIL AGM 2026 Key Highlights: Mukesh Ambani will address shareholders at Reliance Industries' annual general meeting on Friday. Big announcements are expected regarding Jio IPO, artificial intelligence, new energy, and retail growth. The company reported strong financial results for FY26, with growth in retail, digital services, and oil-to-chemicals businesses. Oil and gas unit saw a decline. Stakeholders await concrete timelines on future initiatives.

title: Chinese startup says its AI is better than GPT-5.5. The numbers are turning heads
description: The new Chinese model has posted higher scores on tests measuring reasoning and software engineering abilities, highlighting intensifying competition in the global artificial intelligence race.
content: Chinese artificial intelligence startup Z.ai has unveiled its latest large language model, GLM-5.2, claiming it has surpassed OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 on several major benchmarks used to measure reasoning and coding performance. The launch marks a significan... [2373 chars]

title: Regulators back faster power for AI centers
description: WASHINGTON -- Federal regulators on Thursday ordered regional grid operators to help large energy users connect more quickly to the nation's inefficient and aging electric transmission system, a step they said is needed to accommodate surging demand from power-hungry artificial intelligence data centers.

description: For tech workers, artificial intelligence may be delivering a benefit that goes beyond efficiency: a lower risk of being laid off.
content:

description: Artificial intelligence has accelerated women's rise in the technology space, according to the India AI Workforce Report by Scaler. They reported 145% salary increase after transitioning into AI-enabled careers, it added.

title: Odyssey hits $1.45 billion valuation after $310 million funding round backed by Amazon
description: AI startup focused on building digital models of the physical world secures major investment from Amazon, AMD Ventures and Google-backed investors as competition intensifies in next-generation artificial intelligence.
